emails.subject: FW: List of Topn 50 counterparties
emails.body: FW: List of Topn 50 counterparties To: 'richard.a.stuckey@ssmb.com'

emails.subject: RE: List of Topn 50 counterparties
emails.body: RE: List of Topn 50 counterparties Here is a start on the list. We have a meeting with UBS in the AM to review as well. Obviously, I am putting limits that we would be willing to extend from a Credit Perspective only. Taking into account liquidity and commercial drivers may adjust these numbers. Let me know if you would like to discuss. Regards, Bill To: Bradford, William S.

emails.subject: RE: List of Topn 50 counterparties
emails.body: Did you do anything to it I can't see. To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: RE: List of Topn 50 counterparties
emails.body: Sorry for the oversight. Bill To: Bradford, William S.
